hero_sub: Abstract paintings, built by hand in a single Amsterdam studio. Oxide, ash, oil. One of one — never repeated.
statement_body: Every surface is worked in layers until it settles into something true — then it is never made again. No prints of the originals. No reruns. What leaves the studio does not come back.
studio_title:
Made by hand.
In the dark.
studio_body1: M3 Workshop is a solitary practice in abstraction — oxide, ash, oil and acrylic, worked in layers until the surface stops fighting.
studio_body2: Each painting begins from a material, not a plan. Pressure and restraint: how much to build, and exactly when to stop.
fineprint: © MMXXVI M3 Workshop — Made by hand in Amsterdam
